content.en:
Time passes.

Ye Tian's Demon Hell Ultimate Rules have been improved a bit, and with the assistance of a large number of resources, he has finally raised the Demon Hell Ultimate Body to the consummation realm.

At the moment when the ultimate body of the Demon Hell was consummated, Ye Tian's body began to transform.

After a long time, Ye Tiancai truly broke through to the Eternal Ultimate Realm Lord Realm.

At this moment, his control over the Ultimate Body has been raised to an extremely high level, and his strength has naturally increased explosively.

And.

His ultimate will has also skyrocketed, and he has now reached the level of six transformations.

The reason why he was able to break through so quickly was naturally the effect of the final secret method, otherwise where would he be able to improve so quickly!

"The Ultimate Will has been transformed six times, and if you have three more transformations, you can make the Ultimate Will transform into the Ultimate Will!" Ye Tian said darkly.

The ultimate will, the perfection of the ultimate body, these are the two conditions for impacting the ultimate supreme.

Of course, just meeting these two conditions is definitely not enough to become 21 as the Ultimate Extreme Venerable, otherwise the number of Ultimate Extreme Venerable would not be so rare.

But Ye Tian only wanted to raise the Ultimate Will to the level of the Ultimate Will first.

......

"The Ten Thousand Law Extreme Venerable has broken through to the Eternal Ultimate Realm Lord Realm, yes, he has barely met the requirements, you can send him to that place!" Doom Supreme Venerable smiled.

Immediately.

He stretched out his hand and grabbed it, and the ultimate void in front of him was like a puddle of water, which was pushed away by the Doomsday Extremity.

Immediately afterwards, the big hand of the Doomsday Supreme Venerable crossed the infinite void, probed into the ultimate land, and grabbed Ye Tian from the ultimate land.

At this time.

Ye Tian was stunned.

Isn't he cultivating, but suddenly the heavens and the earth have changed.

Immediately afterward, he saw the Doomsday Exalt.

"I've seen the Doomsday Extreme!"

Ye Tian said respectfully.

This is the ultimate supreme, and he cannot be presumptuous.

The situation in front of him seemed to be that this Ultimate Supreme Venerable had brought him over, but as for why, he didn't know.

"Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Venerable, don't be afraid, I have arrested you to send you to a place, maybe that place is very good for you. Doomsday Supreme said with a smile.

"Lord Doomsday, what is this place?"

Ye Tian asked.

With a wave of his hand, a void emerged, and there was a kind of pagoda that could not be looked at directly.

"The Ultimate Tower!"

Doomsday Extreme Venerable said: "I was idle and bored with some Ultimate Extreme Venerables, and joined forces to build an Ultimate Tower, and then sent the Eternal Ultimate Realm Lord I fancied in, and the other Ultimate Extreme Masters already had a choice of Eternal Ultimate Realm Lords, but I have never chosen an Ancient Ultimate Realm Lord." And you are the Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lord I chose, and you represent me. If you can make it out of the Ultimate Tower, it means I've won!"

"Lord Doomsday, I'm entering the Ultimate Tower now, and those Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lord seniors haven't already entered it, then I'm too disadvantaged, right?"

Ye Tian asked.

Doomsday Supreme Hahaha laughed, and said: "Don't worry, you won't suffer, the timeline in the Ultimate Tower is fixed, and the game will officially start only if the Ultimate Supreme Venerables who participate in this game have chosen their own Eternal Ultimate Realm Masters." In other words, from ancient times to the present, those Eternal Level Ultimate Realm Masters have been frozen by time, and their timeline has not been moved. You're the last Eternal Ultimate Realm Master, and the timeline won't flow until you're inside, and the game will really begin. So, in their opinion, you all went in at the same time, which is fair. "

Ye Tian didn't refute, after all, this was the game of the ultimate supreme existence, did he have the qualifications to refuse?

Doomsday Extreme Venerable said: "I know that you have many clones, and when you enter the Ultimate Tower, all your clones in the outside world will be erased, and in the Ultimate Tower, your clones are not allowed to be refined, which is also for fairness." "

"This ......"

Ye Tian was dumbfounded, he was able to grow up, and the effect of copying his body was great, if he didn't have a copying body, he would not have much advantage compared to other Immortal Rank Ultimate Realm Lords.

"Yes!"

Ye Tianying said.

"Okay, if you can come out of the ultimate tower, there will be a high probability of breaking through to the ultimate supreme realm, of course, the premise is that you can come out, if you can't get out, hehe, then you really can't get out. Doomsday Supreme said with a smile.

Wow!!!

With a wave of his hand, Ye Tian's body was moved to the ultimate tower.

Meanwhile.

The ultimate place.

This is the Doomsday Extreme Venerable's move, erasing his other copy bodies, leaving only a real copy body.

Apparently.

Ye Tian's copy body can't hide the ultimate supreme at all.

However, the Ultimate Supreme Superior like the Doomsday Extreme Superior didn't care at all.

......

The ultimate tower.

Eleven Peerless Ultimate Realm Masters opened their eyes one after another.

They all knew that they had been chosen by the Ultimate Extremity, entered this Ultimate Tower, and lost all contact with the outside world.

These eleven 863 Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Masters looked at the other Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Masters one after another, and then chatted.

"Everyone, everyone has entered the Ultimate Tower, and the purpose is to go out of the Ultimate Tower, why don't you help each other?" said an Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lord.

However, the other Immortal-level Ultimate Realm Lords completely ignored him.

If they really find something, everyone will hide it, and they will only think about going out by themselves, and they will not help others.

Therefore, what this Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lord said was undoubtedly.

Soon.

They began to explore the ultimate tower.

Ye Tian hid in one place, trying to condense and copy his body, but sure enough, he couldn't do it, and a force suppressed his ability.

"It seems that you can only rely on yourself!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Time slowly passed, and these eleven Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Masters gradually completed the first layer of this ultimate tower.

First of all, there are a total of thirty-six floors of the Ultimate Tower, and they are currently on the first floor, and if they want to get out of the Ultimate Tower, they must pass through these thirty-six floors and then go out again.

Currently, their first goal is to enter the second floor of the Ultimate Tower from the first floor of the Ultimate Tower.

Ye Tian originally thought that it should be easy to enter the second layer from the first layer of the Ultimate Tower, but it turned out that it was very difficult.
